spec.title: Vizard — Grafana logo
spec.description: The Grafana mark rendered many creative ways with the Vizard builder — static bitmaps, layered effects and timer-driven animations in the "Grafana" tab, plus football-themed variants (and a waving flag / tricolore gloss) in "Football Fever".

spec.title: Classic
spec.description: The faithful rect bitmap with the logo’s real orange→amber ramp.

spec.title: Halftone
spec.description: Circles sized by the gradient — a newspaper-dot look.

spec.title: Rainbow swirl
spec.description: Hue mapped to the angle around the centroid.

spec.title: Contour rings
spec.description: Quantized radius → concentric topographic bands.

spec.title: Conic gradient
spec.description: A smooth cyclic sinebow sweep around the centre.

spec.title: ASCII shading
spec.description: Each lit cell is a character ramped by brightness.

spec.title: Neon glow
spec.description: Translucent halo circles under a bright core.

spec.title: Isometric 3D
spec.description: The bitmap extruded by stacking shaded copies.

spec.title: Duotone shadow
spec.description: An offset dark copy under the bright bitmap.

spec.title: Stained glass
spec.description: Coloured panes with dark leading.

spec.title: Fire mosaic 🔥
spec.description: A flame mark drawn out of flame marks.

spec.title: Wireframe
spec.description: The icon outline traced as vector strokes.

spec.title: Radial reveal
spec.description: The logo draws itself from the centre outward, then loops. Timer-driven param + a radial opacity ramp.

spec.title: Hue spin
spec.description: A sinebow conic gradient rotates continuously. color = (angle + anim/N) % 1.

spec.title: Breathing pulse
spec.description: Dot size swells and shrinks on a sine wave.

spec.title: Shimmer sweep
spec.description: A metallic highlight band sweeps across the mark.

spec.title: Particle assembly
spec.description: Cells fly out from the centre and re-converge (ping-pong). Positions interpolated by the frame signal.

builder.specOverrideJson: {"params":[{"name":"anim","value":0,"on":[{"events":{"type":"timer","throttle":40},"update":"(anim + 1) % 70"}]}],"transform":[{"calculate":"1 - abs(1 - 2 * (anim/70))","as":"t"},{"calculate":"datum.ang * 2 * PI - PI","as":"theta"},{"calculate":"datum.x + cos(datum.theta) * datum.rad * 27 * (1 - datum.t)","as":"px"},{"calculate":"datum.y + sin(datum.theta) * datum.rad * 27 * (1 - datum.t)","as":"py"}],"mark":{"type":"circle"},"encoding":{"x":{"field":"px","type":"quantitative","axis":null,"scale":{"domain":[-27,57],"nice":false}},"y":{"field":"py","type":"quantitative","axis":null,"scale":{"domain":[-27,60],"nice":false,"reverse":true}},"color":{"field":"v","type":"quantitative","scale":{"range":["#F15B2A","#F8B723"]},"legend":null},"opacity":{"field":"t","type":"quantitative","scale":{"domain":[0,1],"range":[0.12,1]},"legend":null}}}

spec.title: Wireframe draw-on
spec.description: The outline stroke draws progressively along its path (filter by draw order ≤ anim).

spec.title: Matrix rain
spec.description: Falling 0/1 columns light up the icon in phosphor green.

spec.title: Football mosaic ⚽
spec.description: The mark drawn out of soccer-ball emojis.

spec.title: Soccer ball
spec.description: Black & white panels — a classic football.

spec.title: Pitch stripes
spec.description: The mown-grass stripes of a football field.

spec.title: Mexican wave
spec.description: La Ola — a crowd wave of fans sweeps across, and loops.

spec.title: Flag wave
spec.description: The mark ripples like a national flag in the wind.

spec.title: Trophy shine 🏆
spec.description: A polished-gold mark with a glint orbiting around it.

spec.title: Brazil waving
spec.description: The Brazil flag rippling in the wind (timer-driven).

spec.title: Tricolore gloss
spec.description: A white sheen sweeps across the French flag (timer-driven).
